title: Carpe Musicam! birthday performances were a hit
description: MOSSEL BAY NEWS - Carpe Musicam! Orchestra...
bodyText:
[{"type":"paragraph","text":"MOSSEL BAY NEWS - Carpe Musicam! Orchestra and Choir manager, pianist and choir trainer Elsabe Barkhuizen is satisfied with how the groups' 10th birthday concerts went this month.","html":"MOSSEL BAY NEWS - Carpe Musicam! Orchestra and Choir manager, pianist and choir trainer Elsabe Barkhuizen is satisfied with how the groups' 10th birthday concerts went this month."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The concerts were held in Sedgefield, George and Mossel Bay on 6, 11 and 13 April respectively.","html":"The concerts were held in Sedgefield, George and Mossel Bay on 6, 11 and 13 April respectively."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Barkhuizen said: \"From the very first note of Mannheim Steamroller’s take on Handel’s Hallelujah chorus until the last note of the original version of the same item had died away, Carpe Musicam!’s concert, Hallelujah!, was a rollercoaster ride of emotions, surprises and just plain excellent music.\"","html":"Barkhuizen said: \"From the very first note of Mannheim Steamroller’s take on Handel’s Hallelujah chorus until the last note of the original version of the same item had died away, Carpe Musicam!’s concert, Hallelujah!, was a rollercoaster ride of emotions, surprises and just plain excellent music.\""},{"type":"blockquote","text":"The George and Sedgefield concerts were sold out and the Mossel Bay one well attended."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Barkhuizen said: \"The orchestra was in top form, with transparent ensemble work in sections of the Surprise! Symphony – a collection of snippets from famous symphonies.","html":"Barkhuizen said: \"The orchestra was in top form, with transparent ensemble work in sections of the Surprise! Symphony – a collection of snippets from famous symphonies."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"\"In gentler moments, violin soloists Jean Kotze and Simei Verster led the orchestra thoughtfully and sweetly through Elgar’s Salut d’Amour.\""},{"type":"paragraph","text":"She noted that the large choir added a new dimension to an already \"wonderful\" event in the expressive Were you There? , the monumental yet delicate va Pensiero, the soul-rocking MASSive – a mass in rock 'n roll style and the final, triumphant Hallelujah! chorus.","html":"She noted that the large choir added a new dimension to an already \"wonderful\" event in the expressive Were you There? , the monumental yet delicate va Pensiero, the soul-rocking MASSive – a mass in rock 'n roll style and the final, triumphant Hallelujah! chorus."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"Barkhuizen concluded that the music performance groups’ first concert season of 2025 had been a resounding success."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Keep an eye on their website, https://carpemusicam.co.za/ for dates of coming concerts.","html":"Keep an eye on their website, https://carpemusicam.co.za/ for dates of coming concerts."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The choir after the Mossel Bay concert.","html":"The choir after the Mossel Bay concert.
"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]
